name: Dixa
description: Monitor Dixa customer service platform for agent access and conversation data compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Dixa at https://app.dixa.io
2. Go to Settings → Integrations → API Tokens
3. Generate a new API token
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Dixa Settings → Integrations → API Tokens

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Dixa agents with access to the customer service platform

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Dixa customer service platform is operational
